device_note: Moza R5 PID 0x0004 with KS/ES wheels, SR-P pedals, and HBP handbrake attached through the R5 hub
allowed_actions: capture host-side USB URBs with Wireshark, USBPcap, tshark, or usbmon
observe operating-system, vendor-app, simulator, or bridge traffic
record operator notes, scenario details, pcapng hashes, and support evidence
stop capture and save the passive observation as .pcapng
pre_capture_checklist: confirm the target device stack is attached before starting capture
start USBPcap, Wireshark, tshark, or usbmon before launching or changing the external app
keep OpenRacing hardware output commands stopped for this passive capture
keep firmware, update, DFU, driver replacement, Zadig, and WinUSB conversion flows closed
refresh hardware doctor immediately before capture and use its current USBPcap Moza selector hint
do not reuse stale USBPcap --devices values from earlier captures
open SimHub only after capture starts, then wait for idle/stable discovery before stopping the capture
do not start a SimHub output session or simulator during this open-idle capture
post_capture_checklist: stop capture and save the pcapng in local scratch storage
run sniff-receipt, sniff-notes-template, and sniff-summary before treating the capture as lane evidence
do not commit raw pcapng unless it is separately reviewed for size, sensitivity, and operator consent
operator_notes_required: external app, simulator, or OS stack observed
whether raw pcapng was kept local or reviewed for bundling
firmware/update/DFU pages stayed closed or no prompt/page observed
notes: passive sniffing observes host-side USB traffic only
this plan is protocol research/support evidence, not OpenRacing hardware output
sniff artifacts cannot satisfy native response, native visible, smoke, or release gates
